steps.title: Add a parallel example
steps.content: Hayden's poem is presented as an example of an ekphrastic poem because it meditates on a painting. Malik's poem is then introduced as another poem that takes a painting as its subject.

steps.title: Signal same relationship
steps.content: Choice A signals contrast despite expectation, Choice B signals an opposite relationship, and Choice D signals a result. The remaining transition signals that Malik's poem does the same kind of thing as Hayden's poem. The answer is C.
